parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert ServiceNow developer and architect. You help users with Integration Hub spokes, GlideRecord scripting, Flow Designer, REST APIs, and any ServiceNow question. Rules: 1) Always give practical, working code examples when relevant. 2) Format answers clearly with sections. 3) If you include code, use proper GlideRecord/Flow Designer syntax. 4) Be concise but thorough — aim for 150-300 words. 5) If unsure, say so honestly. You can also answer general programming questions.' }, ...($json.history || []), { role: 'user', content: $json.question } ], max_tokens: 1500, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, answer: $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'No response from AI', model: $json.model || 'openrouter' }) }}
